character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: A woman who retrieves a bundle of papers and a canvas bag containing gold from a chest, engages in a count of coins, and argues over the amount owed to her.

character_dossiers.name: I
character_dossiers.biography: A first-person narrator who assists their mother in counting coins, intervenes during a tense moment with the blind man, and helps their mother escape.

character_dossiers.name: the blind man
character_dossiers.biography: A figure whose tapping stick and attempts to enter an inn create tension during the scene.

character_dossiers.name: Mrs. Crossley
character_dossiers.biography: A woman whose bag is counted by the narrator's mother as part of the coin distribution.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A figure associated with the gold and coins counted by the narrator's mother.
